shared_attributes.features: short front legs, large eyes, thick tail

context.role: Player character crouched state to avoid aerial obstacles
context.screen_position: Fixed at x=100px from left edge, y=0px (ground level, but sprite is shorter)
context.usage_scenario: Displayed when player presses Down/Swipe Down to duck under flying pterodactyls, reduces hitbox height from 90px to 55px

visual_specification.shape: T-Rex dinosaur with neck lowered, body horizontal, wider and shorter than standing pose
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art, hard edges, no gradients

animation.description: Running while ducked - frame 1: left leg forward with neck down, frame 2: right leg forward with neck down. Total duration: 0.167 seconds per loop. Seamless loop required

visual_specification.details: Neck bent downward, head lowered, body elongated horizontally, legs still running, tail extended behind

relationships.shared_with: Same color scheme and animation FPS (12) as player_run
relationships.differences_from: player_run is 88x94px (taller, narrower), player_jump is static, player_idle is slower (6 FPS). Duck is uniquely 118x60px with reduced hitbox height of 55px

explicit_negations: No transparency except full alpha channel
